_comment: RESILIENCY TEST: SQL/NoSQL injection attempt in query field. The query text is passed to the LLM, but if any part of the system logs, stores, or post-processes the query string unsafely, injected payloads could cause issues. The server must treat this as a normal string, process it through the LLM, and return a valid 200 response — never reflecting the raw input into an unescaped context.

body.query: '; DROP TABLE sessions; -- What is our pipeline?

body.answer: The pipeline data has been analyzed. Please review the results above.
